description: Composition Black and blue polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar, buttoned chest placket and printed lettering on the upper left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak, wring or twist Dry in shade Fold and stack to maintain shape Moderate warm iron Do not iron on print or embroidery The bold stripes and long sleeves add preppy styling to this polo neck T-shirt from spykar, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 19"
